nodes.title: Derivado sobre UC-VID-01 + UC-VID-02 para OpenClaw
Tip!
widgets_values:
SageAttention is recommended for this workflow to speed up generation times. We wrote an article to make the installation on Windows more accessible:

[https://mickmumpitz.ai/guides/sageattention-on-windows-installation-guide](https://mickmumpitz.ai/guides/sageattention-on-windows-installation-guide)
En corridas largas de Wan/VACE conviene usar frame_load_cap con formula 4n+1. La validacion rapida de V1 puede usar menos frames solo para comprobar la base.
Stylized cinematic render of the source clip with stable motion, clear silhouettes, and strong visual coherence.
nodes.title: NUCLEO RENDER GENERAL
CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走,

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A woman in dark athletic clothing balances on a narrow metal railing on the exterior of a burning high-rise skyscraper, carefully stepping forward with arms out for balance. Massive flames roar from shattered windows behind her, black smoke billowing upward, glowing embers and sparks flying through the air. Her ponytail and jacket ripple from the heat and wind. The camera follows her from a drone perspective as she moves along the railing. City skyline visible far below at golden hour. Photorealistic, cinematic action movie scene, intense dramatic lighting, 4K.

nodes.title: Install RES4LYF
widgets_values: This node is just to get the RES4LYF nodepack in the missing nodes list of the manager.
